name: ESP32-DevKitC V4
description: Espressif ESP32-DevKitC V4 development board with an ESP32-WROOM-32E module. Two 19-pin headers (J2 left, J3 right) break out most module pins, including the SPI flash pins.
notes: Pin order verified against the official Espressif ESP32-DevKitC V4 user guide (headers J2/J3), viewed from above with the USB connector at the bottom.
No user-programmable on-board LED; the red LED is a 5V power indicator only. Many third-party clones add a blue LED on GPIO2.
ADC2 channels (GPIO0, 2, 4, 12-15, 25-27) cannot be read while WiFi is active; prefer ADC1 (GPIO32-39) for analog input.
GPIO6-11 (CLK, D0-D3, CMD) are wired to the module's integrated SPI flash and are unusable despite being broken out.
GPIO34-39 are input only and have no internal pull-up/pull-down resistors.

pins.label: CMD
pins.warning: SPI flash CMD (SD_CMD); connected to the module's integrated flash, do not use

pins.label: D3
pins.warning: SPI flash D3 (SD_DATA3); connected to the module's integrated flash, do not use

pins.label: D2
pins.warning: SPI flash D2 (SD_DATA2); connected to the module's integrated flash, do not use

pins.label: IO13
pins.caps: DIGITAL_IN | DIGITAL_OUT | PWM | ADC | TOUCH | RTC
pins.warning: ADC2 channel; unusable as analog input while WiFi is active

pins.label: IO12
pins.caps: DIGITAL_IN | DIGITAL_OUT | PWM | ADC | TOUCH | STRAPPING | RTC
pins.warning: Strapping pin (MTDI); must be low at reset or VDD_SDIO is set to 1.8 V and the board fails to boot. ADC2: unusable with WiFi active

pins.label: IO14
pins.caps: DIGITAL_IN | DIGITAL_OUT | PWM | ADC | TOUCH | RTC
pins.warning: ADC2 channel; unusable as analog input while WiFi is active

pins.label: IO27
pins.caps: DIGITAL_IN | DIGITAL_OUT | PWM | ADC | TOUCH | RTC
pins.warning: ADC2 channel; unusable as analog input while WiFi is active

pins.label: IO26
pins.caps: DIGITAL_IN | DIGITAL_OUT | PWM | ADC | DAC | RTC
pins.warning: DAC2 output. ADC2 channel; unusable as analog input while WiFi is active

pins.label: IO25
pins.caps: DIGITAL_IN | DIGITAL_OUT | PWM | ADC | DAC | RTC
pins.warning: DAC1 output. ADC2 channel; unusable as analog input while WiFi is active

pins.label: IO33
pins.caps: DIGITAL_IN | DIGITAL_OUT | PWM | ADC | TOUCH | RTC

pins.label: IO32
pins.caps: DIGITAL_IN | DIGITAL_OUT | PWM | ADC | TOUCH | RTC

pins.label: IO35
pins.warning: Input only; no output driver and no internal pull-up/pull-down

pins.label: IO34
pins.warning: Input only; no output driver and no internal pull-up/pull-down

pins.label: VN
pins.warning: SENSOR_VN; input only, no output driver and no internal pull-up/pull-down

pins.label: VP
pins.warning: SENSOR_VP; input only, no output driver and no internal pull-up/pull-down

pins.label: CLK
pins.warning: SPI flash CLK (SD_CLK); connected to the module's integrated flash, do not use

pins.label: D0
pins.warning: SPI flash D0 (SD_DATA0); connected to the module's integrated flash, do not use

pins.label: D1
pins.warning: SPI flash D1 (SD_DATA1); connected to the module's integrated flash, do not use

pins.label: IO15
pins.caps: DIGITAL_IN | DIGITAL_OUT | PWM | ADC | TOUCH | STRAPPING | RTC
pins.warning: Strapping pin (MTDO); level at reset selects boot ROM log output, keep high for normal boot messages. ADC2: unusable with WiFi active

pins.label: IO2
pins.caps: DIGITAL_IN | DIGITAL_OUT | PWM | ADC | TOUCH | STRAPPING | RTC
pins.warning: Strapping pin; must be low or floating at reset to enter serial download mode. ADC2: unusable with WiFi active

pins.label: IO0
pins.caps: DIGITAL_IN | DIGITAL_OUT | PWM | ADC | TOUCH | STRAPPING | RTC
pins.warning: Strapping pin (BOOT button); must be high at reset to boot from flash, low enters serial download mode. ADC2: unusable with WiFi active

pins.label: IO4
pins.caps: DIGITAL_IN | DIGITAL_OUT | PWM | ADC | TOUCH | RTC
pins.warning: ADC2 channel; unusable as analog input while WiFi is active

pins.label: IO5
pins.warning: Strapping pin; level at reset sets SDIO slave timing, keep high (default pull-up) at reset

pins.label: RX
pins.warning: UART0 RX (U0RXD); used by the USB serial console and flashing, avoid other uses

pins.label: TX
pins.warning: UART0 TX (U0TXD); used by the USB serial console and flashing, avoid other uses
